title: CCPA Vendor Compliance Agreement
description: Data addendum restricting vendor use of California consumer personal data to conform to CCPA/CPRA.
whatsCovered: Prohibition on selling or sharing customer personal data
Certification that vendor understands and will comply
Compliance audit permissions for data logs
whenToUse: Use this addendum to bind vendors to California CCPA consumer privacy requirements, prohibiting the sale of shared data.

fields.label: Company Office Address
fields.placeholder: e.g. 100 Innovation Way, San Francisco, CA

fields.label: CCPA Policy Section Reference
fields.placeholder: e.g. Section 1798.140 of California Civil Code

clauses.heading: CCPA VENDOR COMPLIANCE AGREEMENT
clauses.body: This procurement agreement (the "Agreement") is entered into as of {effective_date} (the "Effective Date"), by and between {company_name}, located at {company_address} (the "Company"), and {vendor_name}, located at {vendor_address} ("Vendor" or "Supplier").

clauses.heading: 1. Scope of Services & Materials
clauses.body: This agreement sets out the supply specifications, technology licensing, financial payment terms, or compliance frameworks for CCPA Vendor Compliance Agreement. Vendor agrees to perform services or deliver goods matching the quality standards set out herein.

clauses.heading: 2. California CPRA Service Provider Rules
clauses.body: Vendor certifies they act as Service Provider under {ccpa_framework_ref}. Vendor is prohibited from selling or sharing consumer personal data.

clauses.heading: Compliance & Dispute Resolution
clauses.body: Both parties agree to handle transactions in compliance with local commercial codes. Disputes shall be resolved through binding arbitration under the rules of the American Arbitration Association.

clauses.heading: Governing Law
clauses.body: This Agreement shall be governed and interpreted under the laws of the State/Country of {governing_state}.

faq.question: How do I customize this procurement template?
faq.answer: You can edit this template online and append custom schedules detailing material spec sheets or IT SLA metrics.

faq.question: Is this agreement binding?
faq.answer: Yes, once signed by authorized corporate procurement officers, it becomes a legally binding commercial contract.
